title: Marketplace Manager - BigBasket - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - BigBasket - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
Join the BigBasket family as a Marketplace Manager in Kolkata. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About BigBasket:
BigBasket is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Life and accident insurance
• Professional development and training programs
• Flexible working hours
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BigBasket!
